title: Indigold Edge
description: A temporally-scoped, directed relationship between two nodes (bitemporal-ready via valid_from/valid_until).

weight.description: Edge strength used by Encompass retrieval ranking and Liminal Atlas layout.

valid_from.description: When this relationship became true (temporal navigation).

valid_until.description: When it stopped being true. Null/absent = still valid (open interval).

provenance.description: Node/source ids that justify this edge.
